description: Label-free regime-diagnostic demo subset: cached per-candidate Z (real score), Zt (matched-decoy score), W (knockoff+ statistic) and self-consistency samples for a diverse slice of Re-DocRED documents, plus the realized matched-recall wedge from the full 152-doc run for validation. Zero API, no gold.

scope.recall_ceiling_definition: max recall of METHOD/PLAIN's shared candidate+alignment pool
